nasb.text: And immediately after they came out of the synagogue, they came into the house of Simon and Andrew, with James and John.

esv.text: And immediately he  left the synagogue and entered the house of Simon and Andrew, with James and John.

cnv.text: 他們一出會堂，就和雅各、約翰到西門和安得烈的家裡去。

ccb.text: 耶稣同雅各和约翰离开会堂，来到西门和安得烈家。

csbs.text: 他们从会堂出来，随即到西门和安得烈的家去，雅各和约翰也一起去。
